title: Nu
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Nu''' was a letter in the [[Tionese/Legends|Tionese alphabet]]. Nu was often used as a [[Callsign/Legends|call sign]] for [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] [[Flight group/Legends|flight groups]], specifically [[Alpha-class Xg-1 Star Wing/Legends|Assault Gunboats]]. An Assault Gunboat designated ''Nu 1'' served in the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

Nu was also the surname of the individuals [[Jocasta Nu/Legends|Jocasta Nu]], [[Koobis Nu]], and [[Risso Nu]], as well as the given name of the [[Ithorian/Legends|Ithorian]] [[Nu Toreena]].

==Appearances==
*[[Star Wars: X-Wing (video game)|''Star Wars: X-Wing'']] {{1st}}
*[[Star Wars: TIE Fighter (video game)|''Star Wars: TIE Fighter'']]
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Alliance]]''
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing vs. TIE Fighter]]''
